command:
import asyncio, json, re
from playwright.async_api import async_playwright

async def scrape():
    results = {'data': {}, 'errors': []}
    async with async_playwright() as p:
        browser = await p.chromium.launch(headless=True)
        ctx = await browser.new_context(user_agent='Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/122.0.0.0 Safari/537.36', locale='fr-FR')
        page = await ctx.new_page()
        # 1. DuckDuckGo search
        try:
            await page.goto('https://duckduckgo.com/?q=difrence+food+oran+facebook+restaurant', timeout=15000)
            await page.wait_for_timeout(3000)
            ddg = await page.inner_text('body')
            results['data']['duckduckgo'] = ddg[:2000]
        except Exception as e:
            results['errors'].append(f'DDG: {str(e)[:100]}')
        # 2. Bing search
        try:
            await page.goto('https://www.bing.com/search?q=difrence+food+oran+facebook+page', timeout=15000)
            await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
            bing = await page.inner_text('body')
            results['data']['bing'] = bing[:2000]
        except Exception as e:
            results['errors'].append(f'Bing: {str(e)[:100]}')
        # 3. Try requests approach to Facebook
        try:
            import urllib.request
            req = urllib.request.Request('https://www.facebook.com/difrencefood/', headers={'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (compatible; Googlebot/2.1; +http://www.google.com/bot.html)', 'Accept-Language': 'fr-FR,fr;q=0.9'})
            resp = urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=10)
            html = resp.read().decode('utf-8', errors='ignore')[:8000]
            og = re.findall(r'<meta[^>]*property="og:(\w+)"[^>]*content="([^"]+)"', html)
            for k, v in og:
                results['data'][f'fb_og_{k}'] = v
            desc = re.findall(r'<meta[^>]*name="description"[^>]*content="([^"]+)"', html)
            if desc: results['data']['fb_description'] = desc[0]
        except Exception as e:
            results['errors'].append(f'Requests FB: {str(e)[:200]}')
        # 4. Try DuckDuckGo for page reviews
        try:
            await page.goto('https://duckduckgo.com/?q=%22difrence+food%22+oran+avis+restaurant', timeout=15000)
            await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
            ddg2 = await page.inner_text('body')
            results['data']['reviews_search'] = ddg2[:1500]
        except Exception as e:
            results['errors'].append(f'DDG2: {str(e)[:100]}')
        # 5. Try Google Maps search
        try:
            await page.goto('https://duckduckgo.com/?q=difrence+food+oran+google+maps+restaurant+fast+food', timeout=15000)
            await page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
            maps = await page.inner_text('body')
            results['data']['maps_search'] = maps[:1500]
        except Exception as e:
            results['errors'].append(f'Maps: {str(e)[:100]}')
        await browser.close()
    print(json.dumps(results, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)[:6000])

asyncio.run(scrape())
description: محاولة بديلة: البحث عبر DuckDuckGo/Bing + requests لجلب بيانات difrence food
